channel.title: Electrical on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Electrical on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide

item.title: Bluetti Charger 1 Alternator Charger Review for Camper Vans
item.description:
Bluetti Charger 1 Alternator Charger Review for Camper Vans
#

After seven years full-time in a 2017 Dodge ProMaster 2500, I can tell you this: alternator charging is one of the most underrated upgrades in van life. Solar is excellent, but weather and parking conditions can cut your harvest hard. A good alternator charger for camper van use fills that gap and keeps your power plan stable. I tested the Bluetti Charger 1 in real driving workflows, not just in ideal install demos.
